zh.lifeSummary: Estefanía Alfonso de Castilla是Rey Alfonso VII de Castilla y León和Condesa Urraca Fernández de Castro的女兒，於1148年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多。她和Fernando Rodríguez de Castro "el Castellano"至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1180年7月1日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安利安享年32歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安利安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Estefanía Alfonso de Castilla是Rey Alfonso VII de Castilla y León和Condesa Urraca Fernández de Castro的女儿，于1148年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多。她和Fernando Rodríguez de Castro "el Castellano"至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1180年7月1日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安利安享年32岁，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安利安。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Castilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Carlos, Raul, Sergio, Jesus, Jorge, Pablo, Ruben, Blanca, Elido, Francisco, Guillermo.
Spanish: habitational name from Castile (Spanish Castilla), a region in central Spain. The name derives from the many castles in the region. This surname is also found in southern France.
History: As an independent kingdom between the 10th and 15th centuries, Castile formed the largest power in the Iberian peninsula.

variants.name: Castiglia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonino, Benedetto, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Gennaro, Giacomo, Giuseppe, Ignazio.
Italian: habitational name from Castile (Italian Castiglia) in central Spain (see Castilla ).

nameMeanings.name: Estefanía
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stephen
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

nameMeanings.name: Alfonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready’; a traditional royal name.

en.lifeSummary: Estefanía Alfonso de Castilla was born in 1148, in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain as the daughter of Rey Alfonso VII de Castilla y León and Condesa Urraca Fernández de Castro. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Fernando Rodríguez de Castro "el Castellano". She died on 1 July 1180, in León, León, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 32, and was buried in León, León, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Estefanía Alfonso de Castilla est née en 1148, à Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, fille de Rey Alfonso VII de Castilla y León et Condesa Urraca Fernández de Castro. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Fernando Rodríguez de Castro "el Castellano". Elle est décédée le 1 juillet 1180, à León, León, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterrée à León, León, Castilla y León, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Estefanía Alfonso de Castilla wurde 1148 in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien, als Tochter von Rey Alfonso VII de Castilla y León und Condesa Urraca Fernández de Castro geboren. Sie hatte mit Fernando Rodríguez de Castro "el Castellano" mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 1. Juli 1180 im Alter von 32 Jahren in León, León, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in León, León, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Fernando Rodríguez de Castro "el Castellano". ja.lifeSummary: Estefanía Alfonso de Castillaは1148年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドトーレドでRey Alfonso VII de Castilla y LeónとCondesa Urraca Fernández de Castroの娘として生まれた。彼女はFernando Rodríguez de Castro "el Castellano"との間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1180年7月1日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンレoンレoンで32歳で死去し，スペインカスティラ イ レoンレoンレoンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Estefanía Alfonso de Castilla(은)는 1148년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도 톨도에서 Rey Alfonso VII de Castilla y León(와)과 Condesa Urraca Fernández de Castro의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Fernando Rodríguez de Castro "el Castellano"(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1180년 7월 1일 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 레o 레o에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 레o 레o에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Estefanía Alfonso de Castilla nasceu em 1148, em Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha filha de Rey Alfonso VII de Castilla y León e Condesa Urraca Fernández de Castro. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Fernando Rodríguez de Castro "el Castellano". Ela faleceu em 1 de julho de 1180, em León, León, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 32 anos, e foi sepultada em León, León, Castilla y León, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Estefanía Alfonso de Castilla родилась в 1148 г. в местности толедо, толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. Её родителей звали Rey Alfonso VII de Castilla y León и Condesa Urraca Fernández de Castro. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Fernando Rodríguez de Castro "el Castellano". Она умерла 1 июля 1180 г. в местности леoн, леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 32 лет и была похоронена в местности леoн, леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания.
